articles.title: Apple Memorial Day Sales on Macs and iPads
articles.summary: Apple has Memorial Day sales. Get good prices on Macs and iPads. AirPods are also on sale.
articles.impact: Save money on Apple products this holiday.

articles.title: Sony Wearable AC Keeps You Cool
articles.summary: Sony made a wearable AC. It's the Reon Pocket Pro Plus. It helps you stay cool.
articles.impact: Sony offers a new way to beat summer heat.

articles.title: James Bond Game Footage Leaked, Then Released
articles.summary: New James Bond game video leaked. The studio then showed official footage. It shows the first mission.
articles.impact: Fans can now see the start of the new James Bond game.

articles.title: AMD Graphics Card May Go Global
articles.summary: An AMD graphics card was found. It may launch outside China. This is the RX 9070 GRE.
articles.impact: More gamers might get this new AMD graphics card.

articles.title: Smart Glasses Tech Now Better
articles.summary: A company thinks smart glasses are fixed. Xreal partnered with Google. This tech was difficult.
articles.impact: Smart glasses could be more useful daily.

articles.title: Apple Improving AirPods Control
articles.summary: Apple is changing AirPods. They want fewer annoyances. This is about how you control them.
articles.impact: Using AirPods will soon be smoother.

articles.title: Pixel 11 'Glow' Feature Not at I/O
articles.summary: A Google phone feature may not exist. It's called 'Pixel Glow'. An event photo caused confusion.
articles.impact: Rumors about a new Pixel phone feature may be wrong.

articles.title: Expensive Used AMG Cars for Sale
articles.summary: Two used AMG cars are for sale. One has a V8 engine. The other has six cylinders. The V8 costs more.
articles.impact: Luxury car owners face high prices for older models.
